title: Grown-up
content:
Was it for this I uttered prayers,
    And sobbed and cursed and kicked the stairs,
    That now, domestic as a plate,
    I should retire at half-past eight?
meaning:
Edna St. Vincent Millay's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Grown-up"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
